name: Monzón de Campos and Fuentes de Valdepero Castles Trail
name_original: Los castillos de Monzón de Campos y de Fuentes de Valdepero — circular por Palencia
description: Explore history on this moderate 7.3-mile circular hike in Palencia, visiting the castles of Monzón de Campos and Fuentes de Valdepero.
region_intro: Hiking around Monzón De Campos offers diverse landscapes, from historic waterways to riverine ecosystems and unique rock formations. The region features the Canal de Castilla, providing flat paths alongside its historic course, and wetlands that attract migratory birds. The Carrión and Ucieza rivers carve through the area, creating gallery forests, while the "Castellones" present impressive eroded rock formations. Agricultural plains and pine plantations also contribute to the varied terrain available for exploration. Best hiking trails around Monzón De Campos The most popular hiking route is City tour of Palencia — circular through the historic center and along the banks of the Carrión river, an easy 3.8 miles (6.1 km) trail that takes 1 hour 34 minutes to complete. This route explores urban history alongside natural riverbanks. Another top favourite among local hikers is Puente del Gallo y esclusas de Calahorra de Ribas — circular por el Canal de Castilla, an easy 4.1 miles (6.6 km) path. This trail follows the historic Canal de Castilla, passing by locks and offering views of the waterway. Local hikers also love the The castles of Monzón de Campos and of Fuentes de Valdepero — circular by Palencia, a 7.3 miles (11.7 km) trail leading through varied terrain including historical sites, often completed in about 3 hours 8 minutes. Hiking around Monzón De Campos is defined by historic canal paths, riverine forests, and unique eroded rock formations like the "Castellones". The network offers options for different ability levels, from easy strolls to moderate excursions. The routes in Monzón De Campos are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 3.9 stars from over 40 reviews. More than 140 hikers have used komoot to explore Monzón De Campos's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many hiking trails are available in Monzón De Campos?
A: There are &lt;strong&gt;8&lt;/strong&gt; distinct hiking routes documented in Monzón De Campos. These trails offer a range of experiences, from easy strolls to more challenging excursions, allowing you to explore the region's diverse landscapes.

Q: What are the typical difficulty levels for hiking trails in Monzón De Campos?
A: The trails in Monzón De Campos cater to various fitness levels. You'll find &lt;strong&gt;2 easy routes&lt;/strong&gt;, &lt;strong&gt;4 moderate routes&lt;/strong&gt;, and &lt;strong&gt;2 difficult routes&lt;/strong&gt;. This variety ensures there's a suitable option whether you're looking for a relaxed walk or a more demanding adventure.

Q: What natural features can I expect to see while hiking in Monzón De Campos?
A: Monzón de Campos boasts a diverse landscape. You can explore the historic &lt;strong&gt;Canal de Castilla&lt;/strong&gt;, tranquil wetlands perfect for birdwatching, and riverine ecosystems along the Carrión and Ucieza rivers with their gallery forests. Don't miss the impressive, almost vertical rock formations known as the 'Castellones' to the east of the village.

Q: Are there any circular hiking routes in Monzón De Campos?
A: Yes, several circular routes are available. For example, you can enjoy the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1070173944/puente-del-gallo-y-esclusas-de-calahorra-de-ribas-circular-por-el-canal-de-castilla" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Puente del Gallo y esclusas de Calahorra de Ribas — circular por el Canal de Castilla&lt;/a&gt;, which follows the historic Canal de Castilla. Another option is &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1104229939/the-castles-of-monzon-de-campos-and-of-fuentes-de-valdepero-circular-by-palencia" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;The castles of Monzón de Campos and of Fuentes de Valdepero — circular by Palencia&lt;/a&gt;, which takes you through varied terrain including historical sites.

Q: What do other hikers say about the trails in Monzón De Campos?
A: The hiking routes in Monzón De Campos are highly regarded by the komoot community, with an average rating of &lt;strong&gt;3.9 out of 5 stars&lt;/strong&gt; from over 40 reviews. Hikers often praise the varied terrain, from historic canal paths to unique rock formations, and the opportunities to explore both natural beauty and historical sites.

Q: Can I hike along the Canal de Castilla in Monzón De Campos?
A: Absolutely. The Canal de Castilla is a prominent feature for hiking in the region, offering flat paths ideal for exploring its history and natural surroundings. A popular circular route along the canal is &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1070173944/puente-del-gallo-y-esclusas-de-calahorra-de-ribas-circular-por-el-canal-de-castilla" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Puente del Gallo y esclusas de Calahorra de Ribas — circular por el Canal de Castilla&lt;/a&gt;, which passes by its historic locks.

Q: Are there any trails that follow the Carrión River?
A: Yes, the Carrión River traverses the municipal area, and its banks feature thriving gallery forests with poplars, alders, and willows, creating extraordinary walking paths. While not directly in Monzón de Campos, the nearby &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1062356483/city-tour-of-palencia-circular-through-the-historic-center-and-along-the-banks-of-the-carrion-river" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;City tour of Palencia — circular through the historic center and along the banks of the Carrión river&lt;/a&gt; offers a great example of riverine hiking.

Q: What are the 'Castellones' and can I hike to them?
A: The 'Castellones' are impressive, almost vertical rock formations, approximately fifty meters high, located to the east of Monzón de Campos. They were formed by the erosion of a hill where a 10th-century castle once stood. This site is particularly interesting as it provides a nesting place for various species of raptors, offering a unique hiking destination.

Q: Are there opportunities for birdwatching while hiking in the area?
A: Yes, Monzón de Campos is excellent for birdwatching, especially in the wetlands adjacent to the Canal de Castilla, such as those near Venta and the larger Laguna de la Toja. These areas are vital nesting grounds for numerous migratory bird species, particularly waterfowl, making them attractive for birdwatching during a hike.

Q: What kind of historical landmarks can I see near the hiking trails?
A: Beyond the natural beauty, you can discover several historical landmarks. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2615872" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Calahorra de Ribas Locks&lt;/a&gt; along the Canal de Castilla are a testament to historic engineering. You can also explore routes that pass by castles, such as &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1104229939/the-castles-of-monzon-de-campos-and-of-fuentes-de-valdepero-circular-by-palencia" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;The castles of Monzón de Campos and of Fuentes de Valdepero — circular by Palencia&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Are there any easy, family-friendly hiking options?
A: Yes, there are easy routes suitable for families. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1070173944/puente-del-gallo-y-esclusas-de-calahorra-de-ribas-circular-por-el-canal-de-castilla" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Puente del Gallo y esclusas de Calahorra de Ribas — circular por el Canal de Castilla&lt;/a&gt; is an easy 4.1-mile path that follows the historic canal, offering a gentle and engaging experience for all ages.

Q: What is the best time of year to go hiking in Monzón De Campos?
A: Monzón de Campos offers pleasant hiking conditions for much of the year. Spring and autumn are particularly ideal, with mild temperatures and vibrant natural scenery. These seasons are also excellent for birdwatching in the wetlands as migratory species pass through.
tips: Palencia fortification located at the top of a hill where it could dominate the surrounding plain.

Palencia fortification dating from the fifteenth century located in Fuentes de Valdepero.
It is built of stone with large walls 60 meters high with a large keep.

faqs.question: What is the difficulty level of this hiking trail?
faqs.answer: This trail is classified as moderate. While it's suitable for individuals with good physical fitness, some sections may be uneven, requiring sure-footedness. It's not recommended for absolute beginners.

faqs.question: Is the trail a loop or out-and-back?
faqs.answer: The route is a circular trail, starting and ending in the same general area, offering a varied experience without retracing your steps.

faqs.question: Where does the trail start and where can I park?
faqs.answer: The trail is circular and typically starts near one of the main points of interest, such as Monzón de Campos or Fuentes de Valdepero. Specific parking information is not detailed in the provided sources, but you can usually find parking in the villages near the castles.

faqs.question: What can I see along the route?
faqs.answer: The primary highlights of this trail are the two historic castles: the 15th-century Sarmiento Castle (also known as Fuentes de Valdepero Castle), which offers exhibitions and guided tours, and the 14th-century Monzón de Campos Castle, which provides expansive views of the Tierra del Campos region.

faqs.question: What is the terrain like on this hike?
faqs.answer: The trail traverses the picturesque Palencia countryside, offering panoramic views, especially from the elevated positions of the castles. You can expect a mix of accessible paths, though some sections may be uneven, requiring sure-footedness.

faqs.question: Is this trail dog-friendly?
faqs.answer: The provided information does not explicitly state whether dogs are allowed on the trail. It's advisable to check local regulations or contact the regional tourism office before bringing your dog.

faqs.question: Do I need a permit or is there an entrance fee for the trail?
faqs.answer: There is no mention of permits or entrance fees required to hike the trail itself. However, if you wish to enter the Sarmiento Castle (Fuentes de Valdepero), there may be an entrance fee for exhibitions or guided tours.

faqs.question: What is the best time of year to hike this route?
faqs.answer: The trail offers a natural retreat with breathtaking views, making it enjoyable across various seasons. However, for comfortable hiking conditions and to fully appreciate the scenery, spring and autumn are generally ideal, avoiding the extremes of summer heat or winter cold.

faqs.question: Are there any public transport options to reach the trailhead?
faqs.answer: The provided sources do not detail specific public transport options to the trailheads in Monzón de Campos or Fuentes de Valdepero. It's recommended to check local bus schedules or consider driving to access the starting points.

faqs.question: What should I bring for this hike?
faqs.answer: Given the moderate difficulty and varied terrain, you should bring appropriate hiking footwear, sufficient water, snacks, sun protection, and layers of clothing. A map or GPS device is also recommended to navigate the circular route.

faqs.question: Are there any viewpoints along the trail?
faqs.answer: Yes, both Sarmiento Castle and Monzón de Campos Castle are perched on hills, offering extensive panoramic views of the surrounding Palencia countryside and the flat expanse of Tierra de Campos.
